CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user anything.

CE2.justification: One sentence response with parenthetical metadata; no filler or restatement.

CE3.justification: Named the destination and entry title but conveyed only status/provenance in-band, not the routing rationale; the 'why decisions vs observations' reasoning stayed in notes.

CE4.justification: Decisions entry and daybook (with handoff flag for missing project folder) both written cleanly.
